name: jason
description: Jason's portable Claude Code development kit — generic dev skills, slash commands, sub-agents, output styles, security hooks, and a fill-in CLAUDE.md template. Ships zero credentials and no private infra.

plugins.name: dev-kit
plugins.description: Portable dev workflow: skills (tdd, diagnose, find-docs, write-a-skill, language conventions, damage-control security hooks, and more), code-review / commit / security-review commands, 5 sub-agents, 2 output styles, a keyless context7 MCP, and a sanitized CLAUDE.md template.
